items.message: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This issue references the `Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkCloud.Models.DiskType.HDD` static property in the `Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkCloud` management SDK. The issue title appears to be a property signature, which may indicate a bug report, feature request, or API question related to the `DiskType` enum/model and the `HDD` value.

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkCloud`
**Affected API:** `Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkCloud.Models.DiskType.HDD` (static property)
**Scenarios:**
- Issue with the `HDD` disk type value in the `DiskType` model
- Possible missing, incorrect, or unexpected behavior with this API surface

**Root ask:** Unclear from title alone — no body was provided; the team will need to follow up with the author for more details.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔎 Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

The issue title is a C# property signature (`public static Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkCloud.Models.DiskType HDD { get; }`), which is typical of an API listing entry. Without a body or description, the exact nature of the issue (bug, missing feature, question) is unknown.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Follow up with the author to request a detailed description, reproduction steps, and expected vs. actual behavior.
2. Check the current `DiskType` model in the latest version of `Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkCloud` to see if `HDD` is present and correctly defined.
3. Verify whether this is an API gap compared to the underlying REST API spec for Operator Nexus - Network Cloud.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Mgmt` — The package name `Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkCloud` clearly falls under the management plane category.
- **Service:** `Operator Nexus - Network Cloud` — Directly maps to the `networkcloud` service directory and CODEOWNERS service label.
- **Confidence:** High — The package name is explicitly stated in the issue title; no ambiguity between categories or services.
</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %Operator Nexus - Network Cloud %Mgmt` (line 1079) — matched because predicted labels include both "Operator Nexus - Network Cloud" and "Mgmt".
- **AzureSdkOwners:** none listed
- **ServiceOwners:** `@Azure/azure-sdk-write-networkcloud`
- **Routing action:** Added "Service Attention" and "needs-team-attention" labels; issue left unassigned per ServiceOwners-only routing.
- **Scan notes:** Scanned bottom-to-top; entries for Oracle, Nginx, and other services were skipped as they did not match the predicted labels. The `%Operator Nexus - Network Cloud %Mgmt` entry was the first match.
</details>
